name: Malted Rye Bread ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the milk and let it cool to room temperature.
2. Bring all ingredients to room temperature.
3. Pour everything into your bread machine in order.
4. Set "baking control" at 10 o'clock.
5. Select "white bread" mode.
6. Press Start.
Note: In hot, humid weather, use 1/8 cup less water. This loaf has a substantial texture and a mild flavor, making it ideal for sandwiching spicy meats like salami or pate, as well as ripe cheese. For early meals, toast the bread and spread with orange marmalade or apple butter.
